channel.title: Uk on Mountain Diaries
channel.description: Recent content in Uk on Mountain Diaries

item.title: West Highland Way, Scotland
item.description: I had decided to walk the West Highland Way in Scotland in mid-June 2018, which was one of the most spontaneous decisions I’ve ever made in my life. I’d booked a flight to the UK a week before its departure and I only decided on walking the WHW after I arrived in Edinburgh. I started doing real research a few days before I started walking and my last-minute planning meant a lot of frantic googling on the internet and numerous calls to the cheapest accommodation available during one of the busiest seasons of the year.
